title: thymus striatus var. longicaulis
intro: Thymus striatus var. longicaulis is a variant of the Thymus striatus plant, commonly known as the striped thyme, a low-growing, spreading shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thymus striatus var. longicaulis are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and essential oils that can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
